quick_skim.title: An Efficient Newton Algorithm for Nonnegative Matrix Factorization with the Kullback-Leibler Divergence
quick_skim.abstract: Nonnegative Matrix Factorization (NMF) is a fundamental tool in unsupervised learning, which approximates a nonnegative matrix by the product of two low-rank nonnegative factors. The Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence is best suited to measure the data to model discrepancy when the decomposed data sample follows a Poisson distribution, which is the case for count datasets such as term-document matrices or images. Most KL-NMF algorithms in the literature minimize a separable majorant of the loss to find their next iterate. We argue that this method has reached its limits and propose to use instead the second-order Taylor expansion of the loss, leading to a Newton-type method. We minimize this non-separable surrogate by proposing a generalization of the well-known HALS algorithm. This yields an efficient KL-NMF algorithm which provably converges and which competes favorably with state-of-the-art algorithms on a large variety of datasets.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Efficient Newton algorithm for KL-NMF providing low-rank representation, directly applicable to HSI denoising
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 高效牛顿算法用于KL散度NMF，提供低秩表示，可直接用于高光谱去噪
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 高效牛顿算法用于KL散度NMF，提供低秩表示，可直接用于高光谱去噪
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 高效牛顿算法用于KL散度NMF，提供低秩表示，可直接用于高光谱去噪
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a Newton-type algorithm for nonnegative matrix factorization with Kullback-Leibler divergence, offering faster convergence for low-rank approximation, which can be used as a denoising prior for hyperspectral images.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对KL散度非负矩阵分解，提出二阶牛顿型算法，替代传统可分离上界最小化方法。该方法利用泰勒展开构造非可分离代理，在合成和真实数据集上加速收敛并提高分解精度。低秩NMF是高光谱图像去噪的重要工具，本文算法可提升其效率。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对KL散度非负矩阵分解，提出二阶牛顿型算法，替代传统可分离上界最小化方法。该方法利用泰勒展开构造非可分离代理，在合成和真实数据集上加速收敛并提高分解精度。低秩NMF是高光谱图像去噪的重要工具，本文算法可提升其效率。
